case_title: WILLIAM TANG VS. SUNSORES WILLIAM et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG,WILLIAM SERVED OCT-20-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAM, SUNSORES CAWOL, JUAN A, LUIS ALBERTO
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG,WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAM, SUNSORES CAWOL, JUAN A, LUIS ALBERTO DOES 1 TO 4 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $156.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAM, SUNSORES CAWOL, JUAN A, LUIS ALBERTO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAM, SUNSORES CAWOL, JUAN A, LUIS ALBERTO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2072 MISSION STREET, #15, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
